testcase.classname: Purchase the order from the ecommerce
testcase.name: Create Order positive case
testcase.system-out: Given Buyer landing to ecommerce............................................passed Given Buyer logged to website email simanjuntakalbert57@gmail.com and password XBf@rWNvByn!#K8.passed When I add product ZARA COAT 3 to Create....................................passed And I checkout ZARA COAT 3 and submit order.................................passed Then "THANKYOU FOR THE ORDER." message is displayed on confirmation page....passed
